title: Best Capstone Project
description: Achieved Best Capstone Project at the Asah By Dicoding With Title AI Learning Insights.

title: Honorable Mention 2025 International Collegiate Programming Contest (ICPC) Asia Jakarta Regional Contest
description: Achieved Honorable Mention at the 2025 International Collegiate Programming Contest (ICPC) Asia Jakarta Regional Contest, an international-level competition. Qualified after successfully passing the Indonesia National Contest (INC) 2025, competing against top teams from across the country.

title: Finalist Senior Competitive Programming Contest COMPFEST 17
description: Selected as a finalist in the Senior Competitive Programming Contest at COMPFEST 17, Universitas Indonesia. Qualified after passing the preliminary round and ranking among the Top 20 teams nationwide.

title: 21st Place Indonesia National Contest 2025
description: Qualified as a finalist in the Indonesia National Contest (INC) 2025, the national qualification round for the ICPC Asia Jakarta Regional Contest. Advanced to the international regional stage after competing against top university teams across Indonesia.

title: 1st Runner Up HOLOGY 8.0 Competitive Programming
description: Secured 1st Runner-Up at HOLOGY 8.0, a national-level competitive programming competition. Demonstrated strong problem-solving, algorithmic thinking, and teamwork in a highly competitive environment.

title: 2nd Place Technofair 12.0 Competitive Programming
description: Secured 2nd Place at Technofair 12.0, a university-level competitive programming competition. Showcased solid performance in data structures, algorithms, and logical reasoning in a highly competitive academic environment.

title: Speaker: Miniclass Competitive Programming
description: Delivered a insightful lecture on Competitive Programming including problem-solving strategies, algorithmic thinking, and practical coding tips.

title: 1st Place CodeFest 03 Competitive Programming
description: Won 1st Place at CodeFest 3.0, a university-level competitive programming competition organized by Gunadarma.io. Demonstrated strong algorithmic thinking and efficient problem-solving skills.

title: Honorable Mention 2024 International Collegiate Programming Contest (ICPC) Asia Jakarta Regional Contest
description: Awarded Honorable Mention at the 2024 International Collegiate Programming Contest (ICPC) Asia Jakarta Regional Contest. Advanced to the regional stage after qualifying through the Indonesia National Contest (INC) 2024, representing one of the top competitive programming teams nationally.

title: 72nd Place Indonesia National Contest
description: Successfully qualified in the Indonesia National Contest (INC) 2024, earning a spot at the ICPC Asia Jakarta Regional Contest. Ranked among the top teams nationwide and demonstrated strong performance in algorithmic problem solving and competitive programming.

title: 3rd Place  Internet of Things Competition, KOMPRES 15
description: Achieved 3rd Place in the Internet of Things competition at KOMPRES 15, a university-level creativity and software development contest organized by the Informatics Laboratory, Universitas Gunadarma. Built an innovative IoT-based solution combining hardware and software integration.

title: 2nd Place CodeFest 02 Competitive Programming
description: Awarded 2nd Place at CodeF`est 02, a university-level competitive programming contest hosted by Gunadarma.io. Demonstrated consistent performance in solving complex algorithmic problems under time constraints.
